task.title: Changing the Sleep Timer Setting from the Control Panel
task.shortdesc: You can use the product's control panel to change the time period before the product

context.p: You can use the product's control panel to change the time period before the product enters sleep mode.

step.cmd: Press the home button, if necessary.
Select Settings> Printer Setup> Sleep Timer.

Press the left or right arrow button to move the cursor and press the up or down arrow button to adjust the number of minutes of inactivity before the product enters sleep mode. Then press the OKbutton.
Press the home button to exit.
